data.title: OSL Group plans to acquire all Banxa shares
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: OSL Group announced plans to acquire all shares of Banxa through its indirect wholly-owned subsidiary OSL BNXA Acquisition Inc., with a maximum transaction amount of approximately 85.2 million Canadian dollars. Banxa is a cryptocurrency infrastructure provider listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange Venture Exchange, with business covering Europe, North America and Australia. (Sina Finance)

data.title: Bitcoin Treasury Capital increased its holdings by 81 BTC, bringing its total holdings to 147 BTC
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Bitcoin Treasury Capital, a Canadian listed company, announced on the X platform that it has spent $8.7 million to increase its holdings by 81 BTC, bringing its total holdings to 147 BTC.

data.title: Moonshot Launches Moonshot Create, Supports Issuing Meme Coins via Apple Pay
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Moonshot announced the launch of Moonshot Create on the X platform, which supports the one-click issuance of Meme coins using Apple Pay.

data.title: Trump’s World Liberty Financial Partners With Re7’s Innovation Arm to Scale USD1 Stablecoin
data.description:
TL;DR World Liberty Financial, backed by the Trump family, is partnering with Re7 Labs, the innovation division of London’s Re7 Capital, to launch a USD1 stablecoin vault on Euler and Lista protocols. Hong Kong-based VMS Group is investing up to $10 million in Re7 Capital, marking its first major crypto investment. The project aims to. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/trumps-world-liberty-financial-partners-with-re7s-innovation-arm-to-scale-usd1-stablecoin/

data.title: Trump family crypto project WLFI and Re7 Labs to launch USD1 treasury
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Trump family crypto project WLFI is working with Re7 Labs to launch USD1 treasury on lending platforms Euler and Lista. Re7 Labs recently received $10 million in funding from Hong Kong family office VMS Group, which manages about $4 billion in assets and has entered the cryptocurrency field. It is reported that the relevant treasury is part of WLFI's broader plan to expand the USD1 stablecoin to Binance's BNB chain. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Ripple May Need to Halt Institutional XRP Sales Amid Legal Pressure
data.description:
The decision keeps in place an earlier ruling that classified Ripple’s past institutional XRP sales as unregistered securities offerings.
source: https://coindoo.com/ripple-may-need-to-halt-institutional-xrp-sales-amid-legal-pressure/

data.title: Arkham: BlackRock Has Bought $1.15 Billion Worth of Bitcoin So Far This Week
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that Arkham published data on the X platform, saying that BlackRock has purchased $1.15 billion worth of Bitcoin so far this week, and the value of Bitcoin held by BlackRock has also reached an all-time high of $77.7 billion.

data.title: BlackRock's Bitcoin Holdings Reach Record High
data.description: According to Odaily, Arkham revealed on the X platform that BlackRock has purchased $1.15 billion worth of Bitcoin this week. This acquisition has pushed BlackRock's total Bitcoin holdings to a record high of $77.7 billion.

data.title: Norwegian Block Exchange Increases Bitcoin Holdings
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the Norwegian Block Exchange (NBX), a cryptocurrency trading and digital asset platform, has increased its Bitcoin holdings by acquiring an additional 10 BTC. This acquisition brings the platform's total Bitcoin holdings to 16 BTC.

data.title: Aptos Blockchain Surpasses $540 Million in Real-World Asset Value
data.description: According to Foresight News, the total value of real-world assets (RWA) on the Aptos blockchain has exceeded $540 million, placing it among the top three in the cross-chain RWA sector. The growth momentum is being driven by ecosystem projects such as Shelby, Aave, Bitwise, and WYST.

data.description:
Catenaa, Friday, June 26, 2025-Institutional interest in bitcoin remains strong as Semler Scientific announced plans to increase its bitcoin holdings from 4,449 to 100,500 by 2027, signaling continued structural demand despite Federal Reserve tightening and geopolitical tensions. Semler Scientific aims to raise funds through convertible notes and share sales, employing strategies similar to those of […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/structural-bitcoin-demand-endures-despite-fed-tightening-and-geopolitical-risks

data.title: Legal strategy matters more than ever for your crypto startup in the UAE
data.description:
In the UAE’s complex crypto landscape, founders who treat legal and regulatory structuring as a core element of their go-to-market strategy — not an afterthought — are the ones who thrive.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/legal-strategy-crypto-startup-in-the-uae?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Bitcoin big players are making moves; Should you follow?
data.description:
While Bitcoin’s price has barely budged over the past month, hovering around the $106,500 mark, behind the scenes, something more telling is unfolding: the whales are back. The number of Bitcoin wallets holding 10 BTC or more just hit a 3.5-month high, according to on-chain data from Santiment. As of June 27, 152,280 wallets now fall into this “whale and shark” category, each holding over $1 million in BTC
source: https://finbold.com/bitcoin-big-players-are-making-moves-should-you-follow/

data.title: Ethereum Records Third-Highest Daily Transaction Volume
data.description: According to BlockBeats, CryptoQuant analyst Oro Crypto reported that on June 25, Ethereum recorded 1,750,940 confirmed transactions. This marks the third-highest single-day transaction volume in the network's history.

data.title: EU and US Confident in Reaching Tariff Agreement by July Deadline
data.description: According to BlockBeats, market reports indicate that the European Union and the United States are optimistic about finalizing a tariff agreement before the end of July. This development comes amid ongoing negotiations aimed at resolving trade disputes between the two economic powers. The agreement is expected to address various tariff-related issues, potentially easing tensions and fostering better trade relations. Both parties are working diligently to meet the deadline, signaling a commitment to improving economic cooperation.

data.title: pump.fun launches version 2.0, adding new features such as one-click follow-up investment
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News pump.fun published a post on the X platform stating that it has launched pump.funn 2.0, which includes the following features:
·Real-time market dynamics push
·One-click follow-up investment to achieve fast transaction execution
·News section to display popular currencies in the ecosystem

data.description:

Avalanche stood out for its growth in transactions and partnerships, while Morpho doubled its TVL and launched a version tailored for traditional finance. The firm also updated its Crypto Sectors framework, adding a dedicated sector for. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/grayscale-just-revealed-its-top-20-altcoins-for-q3-2025-see-which-tokens-rose-and-fell/

data.title: Strategy faces multiple class-action lawsuits, accused of securities fraud in BTC treasury management
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy) has faced class action lawsuits initiated by at least five law firms for suspected securities fraud due to its public statements related to Bitcoin investment. Several legal experts said that it is not uncommon for multiple law firms to compete for the position of leading plaintiff in such cases, and the leading law firm can obtain considerable legal fees. The lawsuit stems from Strategy's purchase of $7.7 billion in Bitcoin in the first quarter of 2024, resulting in nearly $6 billion in unrealized losses due to the decline in the price of the currency. At present, Strategy has responded in SEC documents that it will actively respond to the relevant allegations, but it cannot predict the outcome of the case. (Decrypt)

data.title: Legal Experts Highlight Loopholes in Cryptocurrency Payment Bans
data.description: According to PANews, despite countries like Indonesia, Russia, and Turkey prohibiting the use of cryptocurrencies for domestic payments, legal experts have noted that these nations do not explicitly ban their residents from using cryptocurrencies for transactions abroad. For instance, the Georgian travel company Tripzy has recently started accepting Tether (USDT) payments, offering more payment flexibility to tourists from these restricted countries. Experts suggest that while such cross-border payments do not violate domestic laws, they may attract the attention of global regulatory bodies like the Financial Action Task Force (FATF), especially amid rising concerns about stablecoins being used in illegal transactions.

data.title: Ethereum's Potential Surge and Altcoin Season Indicators
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, Ethereum's technical analysis suggests a significant price increase, potentially reaching $10,000 in the current cycle. Analysts have pointed to Ethereum's technical setup as a precursor to a possible 'altseason,' where altcoins experience substantial gains. Crypto analyst Mikybull has highlighted Ethereum's readiness for a breakout, with the Wyckoff method indicating a potential rise to $3,200. Fellow analyst XForceGlobal shares this optimistic outlook, suggesting Ethereum could reach new all-time highs, possibly between $9,000 and $10,000. These projections are supported by historical patterns, increased institutional interest through Ethereum ETFs, and other contributing factors.

The Altcoin Season Index, which measures the performance of non-Bitcoin cryptocurrencies, signals a favorable time to invest in altcoins. Joao Wedson, founder and CEO of Alphractal, noted the index's indication of opportunity, advising investors to prepare for potential gains. Bitcoin has outperformed altcoins recently, with the index in the green zone below 20%. Wedson argues this presents a chance to accumulate altcoins while they are still lagging. Historical data shows that when the index rises above 20%, altcoins tend to outperform Bitcoin significantly.

Bitcoin dominance, a measure of Bitcoin's market share in the crypto market, is another indicator of altseason. Currently, Bitcoin dominance is at 65.77%, suggesting it is still 'Bitcoin season.' However, a full-blown altseason typically occurs when Bitcoin dominance surpasses 70% and then declines sharply. Mikybull Crypto emphasizes that a significant altseason may begin once Bitcoin dominance reaches this threshold. Popular analyst Rekt Capital notes that Bitcoin dominance is close to revisiting the 71% level, a move that historically takes one to two months after a successful retest of 64% as support.

Pseudonymous analyst The Chart Degen predicts a decrease in Bitcoin dominance in the coming weeks, advising investors to select the right altcoins for potential substantial returns. This article does not offer investment advice or recommendations. Readers are encouraged to conduct their own research before making investment decisions.
